messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0049",
  "title": "不同游戏品类的规模和盈利模式各不相同 各游戏品类的规模与变现继续分化",
  "page_index": 33,
  "page_range": "33-34"
}

Section text:
不同游戏品类的规模
和盈利模式各不相同各游戏品类的规模与变现继续分化
33
季节性因素历来影响游戏获客，但 2025年其波动拐点变得更具可预测性。
第一季度趋于审慎，侧重效果优化；第二季度虽安装量增长有限，但随着效果可
预测性信心增强，策略逐步转向扩张。第三季度延续增势，游戏安装量与投放支
出环比持续上升。第四季度竞争与机遇并存：游戏营销支出在假日季大幅攀升，
却未像往年那样伴随广告投入回报率的明显下滑。
这一趋势的启示不言自明： 2025年的成功，并非在于避开高成本周期，而更取
决于能否在关键时期做好运营准备、全力迎战。
从第一季度的谨慎到第四季度的果敢，这一对比贯穿全年。 2025年的游戏获客
市场，最终并非以收缩为标志，而是以精准、有度的增长为定义。2025年游戏获客：究竟发生了哪些变化
数据来源： Singular 2025 年季度趋势报告www.singular.net

message.content:
**Topics:** Game user acquisition (UA) market trends, seasonal marketing patterns, ad spend efficiency, genre scale & monetization divergence.
**Entities:** Singular (report publisher/data source), game marketing/UA sector.
**Dates/Timeframes:** 2025 (full year), Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, holiday season.
**Key Claims & Trends:** Seasonal UA fluctuations in 2025 became more predictable; Q1 focused on cautious optimization; Q2 shifted to expansion despite limited install growth; Q3 sustained quarter-over-quarter increases in installs and ad spend; Q4 holiday ad spend surged without the typical ROAS decline; the 2025 market is defined by precise, measured growth rather than contraction.
**Strategic Procedures/Implications:** Success relies on operational readiness for peak periods rather than avoiding high-cost cycles; requires a strategic shift from optimization to targeted expansion across quarters.
**Metrics & Indicators:** Install volume, marketing/ad spend, ROAS (advertising ROI), seasonal predictability, quarter-over-quarter growth rates.
**Evidence Type & Source:** Quarterly industry trend analysis; data sourced from the "Singular 2025 Quarterly Trends Report" (www.singular.net).
**Tables/Figures:** None explicitly detailed in the text; underlying data attributed to the cited Singular quarterly report.
**Retrieval Questions Answered:** What were the quarterly game UA trends in 2025? How did seasonal factors impact game marketing spend and ROAS in 2025? What strategies defined successful game user acquisition in 2025? How did holiday season ad performance differ from previous years? What metrics characterize the 2025 game marketing landscape? How do game genre scale and monetization models compare/diverge? (per section title)
